coding_standards: Plain JavaScript/JSX — no TypeScript. React 18 functional components with hooks only, no class components. Routing via @tanstack/react-router (NOT react-router-dom). ESLint 8 with eslint-plugin-react, eslint-plugin-react-hooks, and eslint-plugin-prettier — lint errors will fail CI. Prettier: semicolons, single quotes, 2-space indent, trailing commas (es5), 100 char line width. Tests use @testing-library/react and @testing-library/jest-dom. Test files live alongside source in src/ (e.g. src/Foo.test.js). Always wrap components that use context hooks in the appropriate Provider in tests. The ci-cd script runs: build, then test --watchAll=false, then lint — all three must pass.
